summary: Completed testing of Cancel/Restore Lesson feature. Backend API tests (12/12 passed). Frontend UI verified: Admin Oggi tab shows Gestione Lezioni section with Annulla/Ripristina buttons, Home page shows dynamic banner for cancelled lessons.

integration_issues.issue: Clicking navigation tabs (Lezioni, Admin, etc.) in the bottom bar does not change URL or navigate to the respective page. Stays on /home. This may be an Expo Router limitation in web browser vs native app.

action_items: Investigate Expo Router tab navigation in web browser - tabs don't navigate properly via clicking
Consider adding data-testid attributes to Cancel/Restore buttons for easier testing

success_rate.frontend: 90% - Core cancel/restore UI works, minor navigation issue

seed_data_creation: Test cancelled lesson for 2026-03-20 08:30 created and restored during testing. One existing cancelled lesson remains for 2026-03-17 (lesson_id: 69b7f55d3120edff010b1047)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cancel/Restore Lesson feature fully tested. Backend APIs: POST /api/admin/cancel-lesson, DELETE /api/admin/cancel-lesson/{lesson_id}/{data_lezione}, GET /api/cancelled-lessons all working. Frontend: Admin Oggi tab shows Gestione Lezioni di Oggi with Annulla/Ripristina buttons. Home page shows dynamic banner for cancelled lessons. Note: Tab navigation doesn't work well in browser - may need to navigate via direct URL for testing.
tested_features: POST /api/admin/cancel-lesson - cancels lesson and existing bookings
GET /api/cancelled-lessons - returns cancelled lessons for current week
POST /api/bookings with cancelled lesson - correctly rejected
Admin panel Oggi tab - Gestione Lezioni di Oggi section with Annulla/Ripristina buttons
Home page - dynamic banner for today's cancelled lessons
not_fully_tested: Prenota page ANNULLATA display - could not navigate to Prenota page via UI due to Expo routing issue
